summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept independently unless the hydrated evidence showed a blocker requiring maintainer judgment. Five listed candidates were not present in the compacted preflight artifact, so those are scoped needs_human actions for missing live state only.
